title: triggers
description: manage your global triggers to be used on rules or external triggers

addRulePage.title: configure triggers
addRulePage.description: select and configure the triggers that will activate this rule
addRulePage.templateWarning: please select at least one template in the general tab before configuring triggers

empty.title: no individual triggers configured
empty.description: click "add trigger" to configure individual triggers for this rule

empty.title: no trigger groups configured
empty.description: click "add group" to create trigger groups for this rule
empty.noTriggersInGroup: no triggers in this group. click + to add triggers

empty.title: no external triggers configured
empty.description: click "add external trigger" to configure external integrations

empty.title: no triggers found
empty.description: it seems there are no triggers matching your current search criteria or you don't have any triggers yet.

confirmDelete.title: confirm deletion
confirmDelete.message: are you sure you want to delete the trigger "{name}"?
